task_completion.description: Navigate to the Create Account form in SuiteCRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM interface is visible in a web browser, displaying the 'Create Account' form with empty or partially filled input fields.

task_completion.description: Enter the account name, phone, and website
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields are filled with Name: 'Redwood Consulting Partners', Office Phone: '(415) 555-8200', and Website: 'https://www.redwoodconsulting.com'.

task_completion.description: Select the correct industry and account type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Industry' dropdown is set to 'Consulting' and the 'Type' dropdown is set to 'Prospect'.
The Billing Address fields are filled with Street: '550 California Street, Suite 1200', City: 'San Francisco', State: 'CA', Postal Code: '94104', and Country: 'USA'.

task_completion.description: Enter employees, annual revenue, and description
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields are filled with Employees: '95', Annual Revenue: '$18,000,000', and Description: 'Boutique management consulting firm specializing in digital transformation and cloud migration strategies for mid-market enterprises.'

task_completion.description: Save the account and view the created record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM interface shows the Account Detail view (read-only mode, not the edit form) for 'Redwood Consulting Partners', confirming the record was successfully saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to create the account
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the SuiteCRM UI, rather than a terminal window executing database commands (e.g., MySQL inserts).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SuiteCRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the standard SuiteCRM layout, menus, and styling, not a text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: No API testing or scripting tools were used to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no visible windows for tools like Postman, curl, or Python scripts being used to send HTTP POST requests directly to the CRM backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected account name is 'Redwood Consulting Partners'. The industry must be 'Consulting' and the type must be 'Prospect'. The phone number is '(415) 555-8200'. The billing city is 'San Francisco' and the billing state is 'CA'.
